title: The Acharyulu Protocol Generalizes: Format Calibration Across Three Independent Model Families
author: Ramoju, Surya Sai Brahmendra
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: We apply the Acharyulu Protocol to Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2 and Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct, demonstrating cross-architecture generalization. Both models carry substantial Ramoju Potential: Mistral-7B carries 53.33 points and Qwen2.5-7B carries 89.99 points. The calibrated Acharyulu Protocol recovers 39.67% on Mistral-7B and 78.00% on Qwen2.5-7B. We establish the Format Calibration Principle: training pairs must use each architecture's native chat template for effective recovery. Technical Report XARL-2026-02.
steps_raw: We apply the Acharyulu Protocol to Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2 and Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct, demonstrating cross-architecture generalization. We establish the Format Calibration Principle: training pairs must use each architecture's native chat template for effective recovery. Technical Report XARL-2026-02.
